meaning: adj.<英俚>有趣的,喜欢玩乐和刺激的,(人声)喧闹的,(饮料)醉人的
examples: On these matters, Rorty has me right.
But what do you think I should've done about Miz Rorty?
Rorty is famous for his theory of "post - philosophical culture" .
Why, given his desire to improve the country, does Rorty restrict the grounds for doing so?
